writeFlows.name: Simulation Toggle
flow: User toggles simulation switch in device_detail_sheet.dart
writeFlows.issue: CRITICAL - No UI feedback or state refresh after write

writeFlows.name: Hardware Toggle
flow: User toggles hardware switch in device_detail_sheet.dart
writeFlows.issue: Writes to Control collection instead of device_states

step1.action: User toggles switch, calls cubit method

step2.code: Future<void> toggleSimulation(String deviceId, bool newStatus) async { ... await _repository.toggleDevice(..., newStatus); }
step2.action: Cubit retrieves device model and calls repository

step3.logic: Checks if device.source == simulation, then calls simulationRepository.toggleDevice

step4.action: Calls data source to write to Firestore

whyItMightNotBeResponding.issue: No UI state update after toggle
whyItMightNotBeResponding.reason: toggleSimulation is async void - no await in UI layer
whyItMightNotBeResponding.evidence: onSimToggle callback doesn't await the toggle operation
whyItMightNotBeResponding.impact: Switch returns to previous state immediately, user sees no feedback
whyItMightNotBeResponding.fix: Add try-catch error handling and emit state change

whyItMightNotBeResponding.reason: toggleSimulation has try-catch but only debugPrints error
whyItMightNotBeResponding.impact: Silent failures - network errors don't notify user
whyItMightNotBeResponding.fix: Emit error state or show snackbar

whyItMightNotBeResponding.reason: Device stream updates via watchSimDevices, but toggle writes to different collection path
whyItMightNotBeResponding.evidence: watchSimDevices reads from device_states, updateDeviceState writes with merge: true
whyItMightNotBeResponding.impact: Stream might not fire if Firestore doesn't recognize the change
whyItMightNotBeResponding.fix: Ensure field names and paths are consistent

whyItMightNotBeResponding.reason: toggleSimulation forces source=simulation but combined repo might still route to hardware
whyItMightNotBeResponding.evidence: toggleDevice in combined_device_repository checks 'device.source == DeviceSourceType.hardware OR device.hardwareSensor != null'
whyItMightNotBeResponding.impact: If device has hardwareSensor, hardware toggle is called instead of simulation
whyItMightNotBeResponding.fix: Fix the logic in toggleSimulation - ensure device copy has correct source

whyItMightNotBeResponding.reason: DevicesCubit._emitLoaded only emits from stream subscription, not from toggle action
whyItMightNotBeResponding.evidence: No emit after toggleDevice completes successfully
whyItMightNotBeResponding.impact: UI shows old state while Firestore is updating in background
whyItMightNotBeResponding.fix: Emit optimistic update state immediately, revert on error

whyItMightNotBeResponding.reason: device_states collection might have restrictive read/write rules
whyItMightNotBeResponding.evidence: No error handling shows what permission errors look like
whyItMightNotBeResponding.impact: Silent write failures if user doesn't have permission
whyItMightNotBeResponding.fix: Add explicit error state emission, check Firestore security rules

rootCauses.primary: No UI state refresh mechanism after Firestore write completes
rootCauses.secondary: Silent error handling - exceptions not propagated to UI layer
rootCauses.tertiary: Race condition between stream subscription updates and manual toggle writes
rootCauses.quaternary: Logic error in toggleSimulation device model source assignment

recommendedFix.approach: Implement optimistic update pattern with rollback
steps: 1. Emit optimistic update state immediately when toggle is called
2. Update local _devices map with new status
4. Perform async Firestore write in background
5. On success: state is already correct
6. On error: revert local map and emit error state with snackbar

architecture.title: Consolidate AI Models
architecture.description: Merge AiResult and AIResultModel into single model class
architecture.impact: Eliminates model confusion, reduces mapping overhead

architecture.title: Unify AI Sanitization Logic
architecture.description: Extract _sanitise and _recomputeSeverity to shared utility class
architecture.impact: Reduces duplicate code, single source of truth

architecture.title: Extract Common Data Sources
architecture.description: Merge AiResultsRepository and FirestoreEnergyDataSource into single source
architecture.impact: Single Firestore gateway, easier to test and maintain

architecture.title: Consolidate Energy Widget Duplicates
architecture.description: Extract shared widget base classes for cards, charts, panels

architecture.title: Merge Firestore Collection References
architecture.description: Consolidate Control and Devices collections into one
architecture.impact: Simpler data model, fewer write conflicts
